phase1.name: Migrate from Next.js to Vite + React SPA

1.1.description: Initialize Vite + React + TypeScript config (vite.config.ts, index.html, src/main.tsx)

1.2.description: Migrate app shell (layout.tsx -> App.tsx, page.tsx inline, providers.tsx, globals.css)

1.3.description: Replace next/image with in 8 component files

1.4.description: Update wagmi config: ssr: true -> ssr: false

1.5.description: Update build tooling (package.json scripts, deps, Dockerfile, remove next.config.mjs)

1.6.description: Rename NEXT_PUBLIC_* env vars to VITE_* across all files

ch-1.description: Converted JSON ABIs (getter.json, setter.json) to TypeScript with as const (lib/abi/getter.ts, lib/abi/setter.ts)

ch-3.description: Created lib/contract-interactions/utils/useWaitForTransactionReceipt.tsx (simplified version without ssv-web modal/signal deps)

ch-4.description: Created lib/contract-interactions/core/create-contract-hooks.ts (adapted imports: wagmi/actions, local wagmiConfig, inlined Prettify/UseQueryOptions/wait)

ch-5.description: Created lib/contract-interactions/hooks/index.ts (setter + getter hooks using getNetworkConfigByChainId)

ch-6.description: Created scripts/generate-hook-exports.cjs (adapted paths, added JSON ABI support)

ch-7.description: Ran generator: 66 setter hooks + 58 getter hooks auto-generated (hooks/setter.ts, hooks/getter.ts)

ch-8.description: Copied create-contract-hooks.test.ts from ssv-web, fixed mock paths (wagmi/actions, @/lib/wagmi)

ch-9.description: Added abitype + ts-morph as dev deps, added generate:hooks scripts to package.json

ch-10.description: Fixed all TypeScript errors: @ts-ignore for mapped type constraints, cast abi to Abi for filter, explicit arg types

2.7.description: Slim down use-stake-flows.ts to thin composer

5.1.description: Fix inappropriate error copy in apr-history-chart.tsx

5.2.description: Remove dead AprHistoryChart import from staking-interface.tsx (done in phase1)

5.3.description: Remove all 'use client' directives (done in phase1)

5.6.description: Rename tx-row.tsx -> transaction-card.tsx and TxRow -> TransactionCard (batch-transaction modal)

notes: config/hoodi.ts and config/mainnet.ts are dead code (not imported anywhere)
Old app/ directory excluded from tsconfig (can be deleted after full verification)
Vite dev server runs clean on localhost:3000
5.2 and 5.3 were already handled during phase 1
